_note: Strings marked [??] are uncertain translations. Search for [??] to find and edit them.

mapData.title: Map Data
mapData.layersTip: Tip: Base layers and spatial categories can be managed from the window.
mapData.spatialLayersTip: Show/hide spatial category layers (available after computing 3 routes).

mode.title: Select Action
mode.singleInstructions: Each click adds a waypoint. The system snaps to OSRM. Falls back to straight line if unavailable.
mode.dragTip: After computing you can drag flags (A/B/C) to see live updates.

triple.step5: Step 5: Define Task & Compute Optimal Route
triple.routeSelectHint: Segment breakdown (1/2/3 + ticks) is shown only for the selected route.
triple.editRouteTip: Edit mode: Click circles on route to delete/restore nodes
triple.cancelChanges: Cancel all changes and revert to system solution
triple.segmentPickerTip: Tip: Select route A/B/C in the panel to display segment breakdown on it.

categories.parkDrawInstructions: Click: Add point · Double-click: Close polygon · Delete: Undo step · ESC: Cancel

actions.revealData: Click to reveal data. Any map change will reset results.

results.title: Results
results.detailHint: For full detail, click "Export CSV" in the header.
results.winnerWarning: ⚠️ No route passed the {threshold} threshold. Recommended: Route {route} ({score}).
results.winnerTie: 🤝 Tie: Routes {routes}. Winner by time savings: Route {route}.

export.title: Export Data
export.exportDesc: Create a standalone HTML file to present the scenario to the participant (map + route selection + segment details).
export.pathNote: Note: Many browsers cannot read the full folder path. Files will download normally.
export.mapDescText: The map shows {count} routes between {origin} and {destination}.
export.defaultTaskText: The map shows 3 possible routes between the origin and destination. Select and confirm the route that best meets the requirements.
export.requirementsPlaceholder: Write additional requirements / instructions here. They will appear in the exported file below the task text (bold).

edit.title: Manual Entity Editing
edit.desc: Add and delete entities on the map.
edit.modalDesc: Here you can create, edit and delete spatial entities manually only. No automatic distribution at this stage.
edit.modalCount: Currently: {traffic} traffic, {toll} toll roads, {comm} comm zones, {parks} parks.

task.desc: Here you define the task for the participant (global/local). In this scenario there is no automatic entity deployment — spatial entities are built manually in step 4. You will activate the calculation and recommendation in step 6 ("Results").

automation.title: Automation & Route Balancing
automation.timeGapNote: minutes. (Low = routes similar in time, harder to decide)

toast.mapImageEmpty: Error: Map image is empty. Make sure you added preserveDrawingBuffer: true to the map config.
toast.loadError: Error loading file. Make sure this is a valid system JSON file.
toast.corsError: Security error (CORS): The map server is blocking image export. Try switching map style.
toast.noVizSelected: Please select at least one visualization type for export.
toast.computeFirst: Must compute routes (step 1) before distributing entities.
toast.balanceDone: Done: Full balancing and distribution (traffic + tolls + comm).
toast.parkCopied: Park copied to manual editing successfully!
toast.noGeometry: Cannot extract geometry from this park.
toast.noPark: No park found at this point.
toast.noEntityToDelete: No entity found to delete. Try clicking directly on the entity.
toast.commCenterSet: Center set. Click again to set radius.
toast.commRadiusTooSmall: Radius too small. Try selecting a farther point.
toast.pointNotOnRoad: Cannot place point off-road. Zoom in and try again.
toast.needMinPoints: Need at least 2 points to finish a segment.
toast.noDataExport: No data to export. Click 'Show Results' first to calculate data.
toast.noBrowserFolderPicker: Folder picker is not supported in this browser. File will download normally.
toast.parkDrawMode: Park drawing mode: Click to add points, double-click to finish.
toast.addCommZone: Adding comm zone: Mark center and radius.
toast.addSegment: Adding segment: Mark points on the road.
toast.clickToCopyPark: Click on a green area on the map to copy it.
toast.deleteMode: Delete mode: Click on an entity on the map.

exportManager.title: Manage and Update Exported HTML Files

section1.title: Load Excel File (Data)
section1.desc: The system will automatically search for the sheet: "Scenario Catalog"

section2.title: Load HTML Files Folder
section2.desc: Select the folder with Exp_SCN...html files

logs.title: System Log:
logs.columnMissing: ❌ Error: SCN_ID column not found in sheet "{name}".
logs.notFound: ⚠️ Not found in Excel: {name} (detected ID: {id}) - copied unchanged

batchGenerator.title: Batch Scenario Generator
batchGenerator.noteDesc: Ensure that template.html is in the project's public folder.

logs.noFolder: Please load a folder with JSON files first
logs.templateNotFound: template.html not found in public folder
logs.anchorNotFound: /* DATA_INJECTION_POINT */ anchor not found in template. Please update template.html

exported.taskInstruction: If more than one route meets the requirements, prefer the route with the shortest total travel time.
exported.selectTip: 💡 You can select a route by clicking the line on the map or in the segment time graph.
exported.confirmQuestion: You selected route {letter}. Are you sure?
exported.confirmWarning: Note: You selected a different route than the system's recommendation.
exported.mapDesc: The map shows {count} routes between {origin} and {destination}.
